sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna lolai a ahoih teng buh lom
A kaikhawm ding an late koi a om
Nasep nadingin thumaan phiaukawi keng
Kua mah khawl lo ding an lak khit mateng

sections.label: Chorus
lines: an late kaw'h om
Kua hong kuan nuam
An lak pawi sungah
Kua hong lungdam khawm nuam
Kua'n hong koppih ding
Buhlom hoih teng
Mawhna losunga om buh lom teng

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zawineu zong zui in zong in pha takpi
Lopa asau hang buh om thei ding hi
lamlian zong zui inla nusiat nei ke'n
Vantung innpi sung hong tum khin uh hen

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lo teng khempeuh ah an minkhin ta hi
Leitung khempeuh in lak ding bek ngak hi
A hih hang a la ding tawm lak ding tam
La meng meng kei leenglah asia ding tam

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua ahih ciang hong pai un phiaukawi tawh
An pha kaikhawm un no mihing te aw
An nei Topa hong pai mateng sem un
Tua ciang an lak pawi ah lungdam khawm un
